{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323185228E7FFF210E5B1E446D428"}"},"total":8},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7241517387248567051","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这是一本历史小说，他完完整整的记录了这个中国历史上经济最发达，人民最幸福，社会风气最开放，社会进步最迅猛，却也十分懦弱，积贫积弱，常年被各种外族入侵而困扰的王朝。他就好像我们生活中的每个普通人，有着自己很闪亮的优点，也有着不可磨灭的缺点。作者用细腻的笔法把他们一一记下，并且呈现在读者面前，让我们这些几千年后的后来者也可以一览伟大的大宋王朝的真容。","text_exts":[{"e":8,"s":4,"text":"历史小说","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%8E%86%E5%8F%B2%E5%B0%8F%E8%AF%B4&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774263148E446D428%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227241517387248567051%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227085656679626312740%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%8E%86%E5%8F%B2%E5%B0%8F%E8%AF%B4%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"},{"e":24,"s":20,"text":"中国历史","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E4%B8%AD%E5%9B%BD%E5%8E%86%E5%8F%B2&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774263148E446D428%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227241517387248567051%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227085656679626312740%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E4%B8%AD%E5%9B%BD%E5%8E%86%E5%8F%B2%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1686047241,"group_id":"7085656679626312740","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4KnF0kJKTf9dca3d/4IWzpYuSxVu+qrgNLvc6Idzb72","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"1222309792458989","user_name":"万里长城的基基兽"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1222309792458989","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7085656679626312740","book_info":{"abstract":"大宋王朝，武运国势萎弱不振，但经济繁荣，文化昌盛，政治军事与经济文化形成极其鲜明的对照，貌似不和谐地并存于一体，从而引出历代读史者迥然不同的评价，褒贬毁誉，在在有之。
千年前的宋朝已成历史，然而宋朝的名人贤哲、才子墨客、市井生活、工艺珍玩，却依然鲜明的留存于今天中国人的文化记忆中。宋朝是中国历史上经济、文化相当繁荣的朝代。然而两宋政权却在北方民族的攻掠下，渐次衰亡。个中原因相当复杂，历代学者众说纷纭，民间传说和小说、戏曲也颇多宋人故事。
本丛书立足大宋，介绍了五代战乱的终结、中央集权的强化、右文抑武的家法、首内虚外的战略、穷则思变的改革以及皇帝的荒唐、官僚的争斗等重大事件或现象；同时，从经济、文化、科技等不同的层面重新审视两宋，试图全方位地向读者展示大宋历史的始末。 大宋王朝，武运国势萎弱不振，但经济繁荣，文化昌盛，政治军事与经济文化形成极其鲜明的对照，貌似不和谐地并存于一体，从而引出历代读史者迥然不同的评价，褒贬毁誉，在在有之。千年前的宋朝已成历史，然而宋朝的名人贤哲、才子墨客、市井生活、工艺珍玩，却依然鲜明的留存于今天中国人的文化记忆中。宋朝是中国历史上经济、文化相当繁荣的朝代。然而两宋政权却在北方民族的攻掠下，渐次衰亡。个中原因相当复杂，历代学者众说纷纭，民间传说和小说、戏曲也颇多宋人故事。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/b2f1dffbc9071f6c9113574ff883dfd8~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"王新龙","author_id":"","book_id":"7085656679626312740","book_name":"大宋王朝（全四册）","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#c8c8d8","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"3.7万人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=160&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":402,"name":"中国历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=402&name=中国历史&genre_type=160&gender=2&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7085658399228038175","read_count":"773","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"677673"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.4","serial_count":"139","tags":"历史,中国历史","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/b2f1dffbc9071f6c9113574ff883dfd8~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779447148&x-signature=v4BpuHGE4V9QPOiatxszxmxweNI%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":""},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323185228E7FFF210E5B1E446D428"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读不足30分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":6,"forwarded_count":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":1799,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":2172},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7373887745729299210","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书让我对宋朝有了更全面的认识！它不仅讲述了宋朝的繁荣经济和灿烂文化，还剖析了其政治军事上的弱点。书中的故事和人物都很鲜活，让我仿佛穿越到了那个时代。尽管宋朝最终走向了衰落，但它留下的宝贵遗产依然影响着我们。推荐给对历史感兴趣的朋友们！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1716686157,"group_id":"7085656679626312740","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"以前拼了命的玩，现在玩了命的拼。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8eVvuqzRulLD+V0Gz4rrck=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/e9547c5d0c6949ae9abf261792528d5b~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776788435&x-signature=ANyFeo0HvcEofu7lM0M4Hxt71is%3D","user_id":"730542829472983","user_name":"可爱专属于你"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"730542829472983","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7085656679626312740","book_info":{"abstract":"大宋王朝，武运国势萎弱不振，但经济繁荣，文化昌盛，政治军事与经济文化形成极其鲜明的对照，貌似不和谐地并存于一体，从而引出历代读史者迥然不同的评价，褒贬毁誉，在在有之。
千年前的宋朝已成历史，然而宋朝的名人贤哲、才子墨客、市井生活、工艺珍玩，却依然鲜明的留存于今天中国人的文化记忆中。宋朝是中国历史上经济、文化相当繁荣的朝代。然而两宋政权却在北方民族的攻掠下，渐次衰亡。个中原因相当复杂，历代学者众说纷纭，民间传说和小说、戏曲也颇多宋人故事。

2岁时投到后汉枢密使郭威帐下效力，因战功卓著，30岁就升至殿前都指挥使。他以拜把子兄弟的方式，团聚了一批生死与共的高级将领铁哥儿们，号称“义社十兄弟”，开始发展自己的势力。大宋王朝，武运国势萎弱不振，但经济繁荣，文化昌盛，政治军事与经济文化形成极其鲜明的对照，貌似不和谐地并存于一体，从而引出历代读史者迥然不同的评价，褒贬毁誉，在在有之。本丛书立足大宋，介绍了五代战乱的终结、中央集权的强化、右文抑武的家法、首内虚外的战略、穷则思变的改革以及皇帝的荒唐、官僚的争斗等重大事件或现象；同时，从经济、文化、科技等不同的层面重新审视两宋，试图全方位地向读者展示大宋历史的始末。","text_exts":[{"e":3,"s":0,"text":"赵匡胤","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E8%B5%B5%E5%8C%A1%E8%83%A4&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774263148E446D428%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227257124663912891148%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227085656679626312740%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E8%B5%B5%E5%8C%A1%E8%83%A4%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1689681069,"group_id":"7085656679626312740","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8aZcGcnnBMfeI6a+27Bqsrc5q3+12s43nkKr7tOLnqo","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/37985b60147d447c976e01de7b051c76~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776791933&x-signature=aGMIrKVUoOt0mtiUt8paIKqiq0A%3D","user_id":"1297020747257012","user_name":"Li陳子"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1297020747257012","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\
